facebook.content:
My child, I want you to know that you're not alone in the struggles you're facing. The enemy will always try to isolate you, but God's word promises that He is near to the brokenhearted and saves the crushed in spirit.

You don't have to face the dark night by yourself. You can hold on to God's light, even when it feels like everything around you is shrouded in darkness.

When the weight of the world is pressing in, remember that God's strength is made perfect in your weakness.
facebook.cta:
Learn more about our mission
https://increasingfaith.net/about.html

instagram.content:
"My son, don't let the doubts of yesterday define your tomorrow. The Lord has already given you the victory. You don't have to see it to believe it. You just have to believe it to see it. Declare your victory out loud and watch it unfold. I decree it for you now.

What's one thing you're believing God for? Share it with us in the comments!"
instagram.cta: Learn more about our mission → Link in bio
